voiceButtonA11y: Hold to speak; release to send
panelHint: Say what you need; release to turn speech into text and route actions.
assistantIntro: Hi, I’m your assistant. Hold the microphone to talk; release to send what was recognized.
assistantAck: Got it. Next we can route this to schedule, finance, and other tabs as we wire orchestration.
speechUnavailable: Speech recognition is unavailable. Check the mic and permissions.
